titleStmt.title: SII 16.14: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 14. (A.R. No. 819 of 1917.) MĒḌIREḌḌIPALLI, HAMLET OF MANDALAPALLE, HINDUPUR TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up by the road-side to the north of the village.
This is dated Śaka 1309, Prabhava, Māgha śu. 15, Thursday, corresponding to 1388 A.D., January 23.

It states that Pōli-nāyaka, son of Mahānāyaṅkāchārya Harigila Kiti-nāyaka ruling at Mēḍireḍḍipalli caused a feeder-channel to the tank in that village to be dug from the river Chiṟēru by Peda-Bayirapōju and China-Bayirapōju and granted them some land as dasavandam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śakava¨rṣamu
lu 1309 Āgunēṭi prabhava saṁvatsaraṁ
māga su 15 guruvāramunāḍu śrīman
mahāmaṁḍalēśvara Arirāyavibhāḍa mū
rurāyaragaṁḍa śrīvīraharihararāyani
kumāruḍu bukkarāyaḍu pritivirājya
mu cēyucuṁnnagā śrīmanmahānā
yaṁkācā¨ryya harigila kitināyinigāri
koḍuku pōlināyiniṁgāru mēḍiṟeḍḍipa
lli yēlucuṁnuṁḍi Ā pōlināyiniṁgā
ru mēḍiṟeḍḍipalli ceṟuvuku ciṟēṭanuṁḍi
kāluva tavviṁpavalasi tōlēṭi dēvōju ko
ḍukulu pedabayirapōjuṁnu cinabayi
rapōjuṁ pilipiṁci Ā bayirapōjugāri
cēta mēḍiṟeḍipalli ceṟuvuku ciṟeṭanuṁ
ḍi kāluva taviṁpiṁci Ā kāluva tavina ba
yirapōjugāriki Ā pōlināyiniṁgāru
mēḍiṟeḍḍipalli ceṟuvuvenaka dasavaṁdamu
siṁgayatūmuna paṁdumu maḍi ve
ṭiri yi paṁdumu maḍiṁni pritiviṁni
Ākāśamuṁ sū¨ryyacaṁdrulu galaṁta
gālamuṁnu Ā bayirapōjugāriki ce
llagaladi Ā bayirapōjugāru yi dasa
vaṁdamu paṁdumu maḍiṁni Ācaṁdrā¨rkkamu
ṁnu sēsi kuḍici sukālanuṁḍuvāru ma
ṁgaḷamahāśrīśrīśrīśrīśrīśrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 16.14 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
